name: Christmas Cookie Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and softened margarine until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the vanilla extract.
3. Gradually mix in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Divide the dough into three equal portions.
5. Shape each portion into a roll about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
6. Wrap the rolls tightly and refrigerate for at least 4 hours.
7. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200 degrees Celsius).
8. Using a sharp knife, cut the chilled rolls into slices about 1/8 inch thick.
9. Place the cookie slices approximately 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
10. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes until lightly browned and set.
11. Remove from the oven immediately and allow to cool on the baking sheet.
